The '''Jabiimi Nationalists''' were the faction of [[Jabiimi]] under [[Alto Stratus]] who took control of [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]] at the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. They joined the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] and were opposed by the [[Jabiimi Loyalists]]. Their command center was located first in [[Razor Coast]], and then in [[Hyber Canyon]]. Their military arm was the [[Nationalist Army]].

After Stratus' death in the [[Battle of Jabiim]], the Nationalists fell under the control of [[Thorne Kraym]]. Following the Clone Wars, the Nationalists allied with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].
